title: Grilled Aubergine with Algerian Spices
description: A flavorful vegan dish that combines the sweetness of grilled aubergine with the bold spices of North Africa.
instructions: Brush the aubergine and baby bell peppers with olive oil and season with grill seasoning.
Grill the vegetables for 5-7 minutes per side, or until tender and lightly charred.
In a small bowl, mix together the algerian spice blend, lemon juice, and garlic.
Brush the spice mixture onto the grilled vegetables during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Let the vegetables rest for 2-3 minutes before slicing and serving.
